narrative.zh: 实验室里要配制药水！把液体精确分成3等份——每份加入不同的试剂！
narrative.en: Time to mix a potion! Divide the liquid into 3 equal parts — each gets a different reagent!

narrative.zh: 化学方程式要平衡！左边有原料，右边有产物——让天平平衡！
narrative.en: Chemical equations must balance! Reactants on the left, products on the right — balance them!

narrative.zh: 实验结果有随机性！做50次实验看看成功率是不是接近理论值！
narrative.en: Results are random! Run 50 experiments to see if success rate matches theory!
